versions.version_description: This is how boy's seeking torture play it, it's also mashable with Ed Sheerans "Thinking Out Loud".

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
The other version has some mistakes, and I think capo on 5 sounds cooler.

*PLAY IT HOW TAYLOR DOES IT IN THE VOICE MEMO:
PUT THE CAPO ON 3 BUT KEEP THESE CHORDS SHAPES. THAT MEANS: DO NOT TOUCH THE TRANSPOSING TOOL)
BUT DO PRESS OVER THE HIGH E STRING, 3TH FRET ON ALL THE NOTES EXCEPT IN THE Dm. I KNOW IT'S A BIG
STRETCH BUT I'VE SEEN HER DO IT AND  IF TAYLOR CAN DO IT, YOU CAN DO IT TOO!*

EDITS:
Thanks to catherinet227 for the lyrics correction and mfulms21 for noting a missing G at the end of the
chorus, or sometimes a lack of it.

* = play once quickly and stop or don't play it at all and stop before it.


CAPO ON 5

[ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                              [ch]Am[/ch]
 Nice to meet you, where you been... I can show you incredible things [/tab]

 Magic, madness, heaven, sin... saw you there and I thought:
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]
 "Oh my God, look at that face.. you look like my next mistake[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                          
 Love’s a game, want to play?"[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
 New money, suit and tie... I can read you like a magazine[/tab]
[tab]                                                       [ch]F[/ch]
 Ain't it funny? Rumors fly and I know you heard about me [/tab]

 So hey, lets be friends. I'm dying to see how this one ends
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]
 Grab your passport and my hand[/tab]

[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch] *
 I can make the bad guys good for a weekend[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                        
 So it's gonna be forever or it's gonna go down in flames[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 You can tell me when it's over hmmm, if the high was worth the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                                        
 Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you I'm insane[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                                       
 Cause you know I love the players and you love the game[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Cause were young and we're reckless, we'll take this way too far[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 It'll leave you breathless hmmm, or with a nasty scar[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
 Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you I'm insane[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch] *
 But I got a blank space baby and I"ll write your name[/tab]

[ch]C[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                           [ch]Am[/ch]
 Cherry lips, crystal skies.... I could show you incredible things[/tab]
[tab]                                                             [ch]F[/ch]
 Stolen kisses, pretty lies... you're the king baby I'm your queen[/tab]

 Find out what you want... be that girl for a month
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                                   
 Wait the worst is yet to come, oh no[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                             [ch]Am[/ch]
 Screaming crying perfect storms... I can make all the tables turn[/tab]

 Rose garden filled with thorns... keep you second guessing like:
[tab] [ch]F[/ch]
 "Oh my god who is she? I get drunk on jealousy"[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
 But you'll come back each time you leave[/tab]

[tab] [ch]F[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch] *
 Cause darlin' I'm a nightmare, dressed like a daydream[/tab]


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                        
 So it's gonna be forever or it's gonna go down in flames[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 You can tell me when it's over hmmm, if the high was worth the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                                                        
 Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you I'm insane[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                                       
 Cause you know I love the players and you love the game[/tab]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
 Cause were young and we're reckless, we'll take this way too far[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 It'll leave you breathless hmmm, or with a nasty scar[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
 Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you I'm insane (insane)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch] *
 But I got a blank space baby and I"ll write your name[/tab]


[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               
 Boys only want love if it's torture[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]            
 Don't say I didn't say I didn't warn you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]               
 Boys only want love if it's torture[/tab]
G *                (say I didn't warn you)   
 Don't say I didn't say I didn't warn you


[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                                        
 So it's gonna be forever or it's gonna go down in flames[/tab]
Am                           (over)
 You can tell me when it's over hmmm, if the high was worth the pain
Dm                                                   (sane)      
 Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you I'm insane
F                                         (love the game)             
 Cause you know I love the players and you love the game 

C                                  (eehh)                     (ooooohh)
 Cause were young and we're reckless, we'll take this way too far
Am                                  (with nasty scar)
 It'll leave you breathless hmmm, or with a nasty scar 
Dm                                                 (insane)
 Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you I'm insane
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch] *
 But I got a blank space baby and I"ll write your name[/tab]
